researchSkipReason: in-house serde over existing domain types; no external deps or research. Richer project.create = serde_json::from_value over already-Deserialize nested Project types; application.define = store-backed mutation over the existing ProjectStore port; p1-p4 archival = openspec CLI.

build_required.summary: Richer project.create: accept + serde-validate the nested Project aggregate (friendly-map input; server owns id/schema_version); persist whole via ProjectStore
application.define store-backed home: require project to exist, upsert ApplicationDef by id, persist the mutated aggregate
Optional TargetPort::Store variant to route agent-owned aggregate writes (project.create + application.define) cleanly
Archive p1-p4 OpenSpec changes (12 complete now; inspect 2 partials p2-c002/p1-c004)
